lesson.title: CAPS.Mathematics.Gr10.MEAS.1: Conversions, perimeter, area (2D shapes), surface area an...
lesson.explanation: In Grade 10, you calculate surface area and volume of right prisms (triangular, rectangular) and cylinders. Volume of a prism = area of cross-section × height. Volume of a cylinder = πr²h. Surface area = sum of all face areas. Important: if you scale all dimensions by factor k, area scales by k² and volume scales by k³.
